name: ultrasafe-mcp
description: Ultrasafe MCP server — v0.2.0 runtime activation cut. 5 tools (ultrasafe_run_fanout / ultrasafe_finding_aggregate / ultrasafe_clean_signal_check / ultrasafe_report_generate / ultrasafe_release_gate) over stdio JSON-RPC. Advisory-mode (v0.2.x) — no publish blocking; blocking authority deferred to v0.3+. Per Ultrasafe.md §16. Single npm dep (ajv) for schema validation; schemas in sibling plugins/ultrasafe/schemas/.
